name: @ykdz/template-repository
description: Repository workspace for the YKDZ template generator.

scripts.check: pnpm run check:boundaries && turbo run format:check lint typecheck test check:generated check:templates format:check:root lint:root typecheck:root --output-logs=errors-only --log-order=grouped
scripts.format:check:root: oxfmt --list-different --config oxfmt.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts oxlint.config.ts test packages/builtin-source/templates/*/behavior.test.ts
scripts.format:write:root: oxfmt --write --config oxfmt.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts oxlint.config.ts test packages/builtin-source/templates/*/behavior.test.ts
scripts.lint:fix:root: oxlint --format=unix --config oxlint.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts vitest.config.ts test packages/builtin-source/templates/*/behavior.test.ts --fix
scripts.lint:root: oxlint --quiet --format=unix --config oxlint.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts vitest.config.ts test packages/builtin-source/templates/*/behavior.test.ts
